summary: Comprehensive testing of Code Red Initiatives app - major feature update. All 22 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend features working (100%). Enterprise Metrics system, new status values, Milestones view, and updated navigation all functioning correctly.
passed_tests: Dashboard shows new status cards (Total: 8, Not Started: 1, Discovery: 1, Frame: 1, In Progress: 5, Implemented: 0) - SUCCESS
Dashboard shows Enterprise Metrics section with 6 clickable cards - SUCCESS
Dashboard shows Initiative Overview with new status badges (Work In Progress, Frame, etc.) - SUCCESS
Enterprise Metrics page lists metrics by category (Planning, Sales, Quality, Delivery, Customer Satisfaction) - SUCCESS
Can create a new Enterprise Metric via dialog - SUCCESS
Milestones page shows all 32 milestones across initiatives sorted by date - SUCCESS
Initiatives page shows new status badges (Work In Progress, Discovery, Frame, Not Started) - SUCCESS
Initiatives page filter dropdown has all new status options - SUCCESS
Pipeline Process page shows initiatives with new status badges - SUCCESS
New initiative form includes Enterprise Metrics Alignment selection with 6 metrics - SUCCESS
New initiative form has updated status dropdown with new options (Not Started, Discovery, Frame, Work In Progress, Implemented) - SUCCESS
Risk Heatmap page displays correctly - SUCCESS
New navigation menu working: Executive Dashboard, Enterprise Metrics, Initiatives, Milestones, Pipeline Process, Risk - SUCCESS
App renamed to 'Code Red Initiatives' - SUCCESS
seed_data_creation: Seed data endpoint creates 6 enterprise metrics and 8 initiatives with new status values
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features implemented and working. Enterprise Metrics have many-to-many relationship with initiatives via metric_ids array. New statuses: Not Started, Discovery, Frame, Work In Progress, Implemented (replaced On Track/At Risk/Off Track). Milestones view at /milestones shows all milestones across all initiatives. Navigation includes: Executive Dashboard, Enterprise Metrics, Initiatives, Milestones, Pipeline Process, Risk.

enterprise_metrics.crud_operations: Working - create, read, update, delete all functional

new_statuses.dashboard_stats: All status counts displayed in stat cards
new_statuses.filter_working: Status filter dropdown works on Initiatives page
new_statuses.form_dropdown: Status dropdown in initiative form has all new options

milestones_view.stats: Total: 32, Completed: 13, In Progress: 5, Pending: 11, Delayed: 3
